Disease

Name 中文 Body Part Drugs
Anemia 贫血 Blood Reblozyl
Diabetes 糖尿病 Pancreas, Blood Januvia, Lantus, Toujeo, Farxiga
Multiple Sclerosis 多发性硬化 Nervous System Ocrevus, Gilenya, Aubagio
Arthritis 关节炎 Joints Humira, Xeljanz, Rinvoq
Hemophilia 血友病 Blood Hemlibra
Macular Degeneration 黄斑变性 Eyes Lucentis
Cholesterol Management 胆固醇管理 Blood Praluent, Crestor
Eczema 湿疹 Skin Dupixent
Asthma 哮喘 Lungs Dupixent, Symbicort
Lupus 狼疮 Various Benlysta
Ovarian Cancer 卵巢癌 Ovaries Lynparza, Zejula
Prostate Cancer 前列腺癌 Prostate Lynparza
Pancreatic Cancer 胰腺癌 Pancreas Lynparza
Rheumatoid Arthritis 类风湿关节炎 Joints Xeljanz, Rituxan, Rinvoq, Humira, Remicade
Psoriatic Arthritis 银屑病关节炎 Joints, Skin Xeljanz, Cosentyx, Skyrizi, Rinvoq
Ulcerative Colitis 溃疡性结肠炎 Colon Xeljanz, Stelara, Remicade, Rinvoq
Myeloma 骨髓瘤 Bone Marrow Revlimid, Darzalex
Myelodysplastic Syndromes (MDS) 骨髓增生异常综合征 Bone Marrow Revlimid, Reblozyl
Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia (CLL) 慢性淋巴细胞白血病 Blood Venclexta, Rituxan, Imbruvica
Lymphoma 淋巴瘤 Lymphatic System Rituxan, Imbruvica
Mantle Cell Lymphoma (MCL) 套细胞淋巴瘤 Lymphatic System Revlimid, Imbruvica
Colorectal Cancer 结直肠癌 Colon, Rectum Avastin Yervoy, Ivonescimab
Kidney Cancer 肾癌 Kidney Avastin
Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (T2DM) 2型糖尿病 Pancreas Januvia, Farxiga, Lantus, Toujeo
Spinal Muscular Atrophy 脊髓性肌萎缩 Spinal Cord Zolgensma
Chronic Kidney Disease 慢性肾脏病 Kidneys Auryxia
Leukemia 白血病 Blood Venclexta, Rituxan
Melanoma 黑色素瘤 Skin Opdivo, Yervoy, Keytruda, Tafinlar, Zelboraf, Mekinist, Cotellic
Non-Hodgkin’s Lymphoma 非霍奇金淋巴瘤 Lymphatic System Rituxan
Eosinophilic Asthma 嗜酸性哮喘 Lungs Nucala
Hepatitis 乙肝 Liver Harvoni
HIV/AIDS 艾滋病毒/获得性免疫缺陷综合征 Immune System Truvada
Allergic Asthma 过敏性哮喘 Lungs Dupixent
Age-Related Macular Degeneration 老年性黄斑变性 Eyes Lucentis
Atrial Fibrillation 心房颤动 Heart Eliquis
Beta Thalassemia 贝塔地中海贫血 Blood Reblozyl
Small Lymphocytic Lymphoma 小淋巴细胞性淋巴瘤 Lymphatic System Venclexta
Renal Cell Carcinoma 肾细胞癌 Kidney Yervoy
Metastatic Colorectal Cancer 转移性结直肠癌 Colon, Rectum Yervoy, Ivonescimab
Urothelial Carcinoma 尿路上皮癌 Urinary Tract Ivonescimab, Imfinzi
Lung Cancer 肺癌 Lungs Keytruda, Opdivo, Tecentriq, Xalkori, Tafinlar, Mekinist, Krazati, Pumitamig, Izalontamab Brengitecan, Ivonescimab, Tagrisso, Imfinzi
Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) 非小细胞肺癌 Lungs Keytruda, Opdivo, Pumitamig, Izalontamab Brengitecan, Ivonescimab, Tagrisso, Imfinzi
Small Cell Lung Cancer (SCLC) 小细胞肺癌 Lungs Tecentriq, Pumitamig, Durvalumab, Topotecan, Lurbinectedin, Tarlatamab
Breast Cancer 乳腺癌 Breast Ibrance, Herceptin, Lynparza, Keytruda, Tecentriq, Pumitamig, Izalontamab Brengitecan
Stomach Cancer 胃癌 Stomach Herceptin, Cadonilimab
Multiple Myeloma 多发性骨髓瘤 Bone Marrow Revlimid, Darzalex, Carvykti, Abecma, Tecvayli, Mezigdomide, Iberdomide,
Plaque Psoriasis 牛皮癣 Skin Skyrizi, Stelara, Cosentyx
Ankylosing Spondylitis 强直性脊柱炎 Spine, Joints Cosentyx, Rinvoq
Crohn’s Disease 克罗恩病 Digestive System Humira, Stelara, Remicade
Chronic Rhinosinusitis with Nasal Polyposis 鼻息肉伴发的慢性鼻窦炎 Nasal Passages Dupixent
Heart Failure 心力衰竭 Heart Entresto
Psoriatic Arthritis 牛皮癣性关节炎 Joints, Skin Cosentyx, Skyrizi, Rinvoq
Pneumococcal Infections 肺炎球菌感染 Respiratory System Prevnar, Pneumovax
COVID-19 新型冠状病毒肺炎 Respiratory System Comirnaty
Human Papillomavirus (HPV) Related Diseases 人类乳头瘤病毒相关疾病 Various Gardasil, Cadonilimab
Shingles (Herpes Zoster) 带状疱疹 Skin, Nerves Shingrix
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) 慢性阻塞性肺病 Lungs Trelegy, Symbicort
Severe Eosinophilic Asthma 重症嗜酸性哮喘 Lungs Nucala
Ovarian, Fallopian Tube, or Peritoneal Cancer 卵巢、输卵管或腹膜癌 Reproductive System Zejula
Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) 系统性红斑狼疮 Various Benlysta
Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) 深静脉血栓 Veins Eliquis, Xarelto
Pulmonary Embolism (PE) 肺栓塞 Lungs Eliquis, Xarelto
No matching items
